name: blacklist system
description:
Axis Core Scripts – Blacklist is a powerful and easy-to-use hub built to keep your Roblox games safe and upgraded. Just like in Roblox, every tool acts like XP — helping you manage players, secure your servers, and level up your admin power.

Kick unwanted users, manage multiple blacklists, and monitor activity with simple scripts. Keep your game clean, improve control, and build a safe and fun experience for everyone.

Block players. Protect your server. Dominate the game. 🛡️🎮

name: review system
description:
Axis Core Retail – Review System is a fun and interactive feedback hub built to power up your retail experience. Just like in Roblox, every review is like XP — helping stores level up, unlock insights, and boost their reputation stats.

Track ratings in real time, respond to players (customers), and monitor performance through easy-to-read dashboards. Earn higher trust levels, improve your store’s score, and build a 5-star empire.

Collect feedback. Upgrade your strategy. Dominate the retail game. 🎮⭐
